title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama, enabling easy integration of local LLMs into Python apps.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers.

title: ollama-hack
summary: Community GitHub org collecting hack-day projects, plug-ins and experiments around Ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat component.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Full-featured, open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) template using Ollama embeddings and LlamaIndex.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host a Discord bot that answers users with any Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama; build and run Ollama declaratively on NixOS.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API and reactive extensions.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s chat sidebar.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Tauri and React.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module to spin up Ollama services in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot that uses Ollama to answer questions in channels or DMs.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that talks to any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you run local LLM prompts inside your notes via Ollama.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node to integrate Ollama models into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Community Elixir library wrapping Ollama’s API with Finch HTTP client.
